summary: Attempted to execute V0.8.5 M4 System-Level Architecture Refactor by dispatching the task to the Opencode AI Coding Environment via 'opencode run -m "openai/gpt-5.4"'. However, the API endpoint repeatedly returned a 'user quota is not enough' error (need ~$0.05, quota ~$0.03). Attempts to fallback to Claude-3.5-Sonnet and GPT-4o-mini also failed due to model unavailability or token permission restrictions on the provided API key. The Orchestrator correctly maintained Separation of Duties (SoD) and refused to hand-code the refactor via fallback scripts.
